'''Lady Selnia Harbright''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] from [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]], who served in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She followed proudly in the footsteps of [[House Harbright|her family]] for nearly three centuries.<ref name="The Void Terror">{{JournalCite|3|The Void Terror}}</ref> Energetic, intelligent and confident, Selnia was more interested in getting things done than in bland theory.

==Biography==
With [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] held tight in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] grip, the Harbright family came to realize that [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was a tyrant, and that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was justified. Following the dissolution of the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Selnia served the Alliance in several covert operations, including a supply-gathering mission to [[Droecil]] which culminated in a heated confrontation with pirate [[Black Jack]], deep in [[Keller's Void/Legends|Keller's Void]].
